title: What are you going to do when 30 is given a release date
display_title: What are you going to do when 30 is given a release date
wikitext:
[]: What are you going to do when 3.0 is given a release date?             Quote Post by Asuka 02 » Mon Feb 28, 2011 8:33 pm I mean the release Date

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Mon Feb 28, 2011 9:03 pm Say "about time". That's pretty much it for me.

[]:             Quote Post by Combs » Mon Feb 28, 2011 9:19 pm Painstakingly over analyze the trailer, of course.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Mon Feb 28, 2011 9:30 pm Nothing.

[]:             Quote Post by Ritsuko » Mon Feb 28, 2011 10:04 pm Combs wrote: Painstakingly over analyze the trailer, of course.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Feb 28, 2011 10:07 pm "Oh, look. Q has a release date now. Cool."

[]:             Quote Post by Marduk » Mon Feb 28, 2011 10:10 pm Nothing. Probably discuss the new trailer but that's about it. And, Ritsuko, that's not Misato. (somebody immortalize this line... NOW) That's whatchamaycallher from a certain show which name escapes me atm double fail

[]:             Quote Post by COACH » Mon Feb 28, 2011 10:49 pm Change my underwear.

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Mon Feb 28, 2011 11:00 pm The same thing I do every day Asuka. Try to take over the world.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Feb 28, 2011 11:01 pm What are you going to do when 3.0 is given a release date?

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Mon Feb 28, 2011 11:14 pm Have hot sex with Mari while watching Gendo lick Shinji's yoshi-goodness, all to unfitting music for the next 2 years. That's right... I went there.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Mon Feb 28, 2011 11:28 pm practice becoming invisible, though I would be doing that whether I heard it or not, in fact it's that time again, time for me to go get invisible.

[]:             Quote Post by Cody MacArthur Fett » Tue Mar 01, 2011 12:21 am Avoid spoilers, and patiently await a North American release date. I'll most likely fail on the spoilers front, but if nothing else I'm patient.

[]:             Quote Post by zlink64 » Tue Mar 01, 2011 12:36 am Count the days between 2.o and 3.0 dates and guesstamate what 4.0 dates are gonna be.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Mar 01, 2011 12:41 am Book another ticket to Japan.

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Tue Mar 01, 2011 1:07 am Give a "yawn" and a shrug and then goes off to do something else. Honestly i'll be more excited when i see a freakin trailer or some new media. I'll go rabid when a cam-rip comes out. But i dont anticipate we'll be seeing that until 2012. Or at worst maybe 2013. Dont even count on 3.0 being released stateside until 2014. LOL.

[]:             Quote Post by Seen » Tue Mar 01, 2011 2:07 am Add 3.0 to the list of events/games/shows I check for updates on regularly.

[]:             Quote Post by A.T. Fish » Tue Mar 01, 2011 5:15 am I'll likely leave the forum to avoid all the anticipation, only to come back a month after the release date looking for a watchable torrent.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Tue Mar 01, 2011 6:03 am I'm going to watch child of Lilith do nothing, until he politely asks me to stop staring at him. A request which I will ignore, unless threatened with physical violence.

[]:             Quote Post by Hatsumi92 » Tue Mar 01, 2011 8:00 am I'll bake everyone a pie and you'll all hate me because it'll taste dreadful and then I'll never come back out of shame.
